title: Jujutsu Kaisen Origins
description: Adds Cursed Techniques and related progression to origins!
body:
THIS DATAPACK IS ABANDONED, IF YOU WANT TO SEE MORE JJK CONTENT THEN CHECK OUT THE MOD I'M WORKING ON CALLED "Jujutsu Blocks". Join the discord to keep up with its development https://discord.gg/ndZ97GJ9MG

This datapack brings jujutsu kaisen into origins!
- Sorcerer, non sorcerer (vanilla), cursed corpse and curse race that all have unique features
- Achievement based grade progression and skills like reverse curse technique that can be unlocked
- 16 currently usable techniques that become stronger and unlock more abilities as you grade up
- cursed energy and rct systems alongside a strain system (brain damage)
- binding vows that you can repick upon rejoining a world
- black flash and zone system 
- chance based traits (six eyes, curse mutations etc)

Please ensure you have all the dependencies for this mod or else it may not work, if you don't add unoriginal then just ensure that you pick human as your regular origin.
The datapack might also work in older versions but I haven't tested it. (reportedly works for 1.20.2+)
NOTE: this pack is not meant to be balanced compared to vanilla mobs and such its more meant for pvp but do feel free to use it in vanilla if you want to be op
